name: Toasted Almond Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour a 12-cup Bundt cake pan or tube pan, 10x4 inches.
Beat sugar, margarine and eggs in a large bowl on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
Beat on high speed for 5 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
Mix flour, cinnamon, baking powder and salt. Beat in alternately with milk on low speed.
Fold in almonds. Spread in pan.
Bake 70-80 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 20 minutes.
Invert onto a heatproof serving plate; remove the pan. Serve with Cinnamon-Chocolate Sauce and whipped cream.
